summary: AI/ML engineer with expertise in building scalable GenAI systems, pretraining foundational models, and designing alignment frameworks. Specializing in LLM architectures, Constitutional AI, and agentic integrations using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Passionate about advancing research at the intersection of machine learning ethics and systems engineering.
achievements: Featured speaker & researcher at the 2026 IndiaAI Impact Summit
Selected among the top-6 national teams in the case study competition by German High-Bridge Consulting
Mentored 300+ undergraduate students as a computer programming lab teaching assistant
